Ravenscale Mask  
 

Lore Item
Slot: FACE
AC: 8
CHA: +5
SV POISON: +10
Effect: See Invisible (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.8 Size: SMALL
Class: ROG
Race: ALL except ERU HIE TRL OGR IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Lore Item
Slot: FACE
AC: 8
CHA: +5
SV POISON: +10
Effect: See Invisible (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)

Picked one up for my lvl 15 rogue in bazaar for 450p, and it is "on" all the time at that level as well! Yay!

Original main, from "back in the day", Wuji, 65 Halfling Druid, Nameless Server (relegated to the dustbin of history)
Current main, Kyfho, 125 Froglok Monk, Tunare Server (with a Froglok Pally persona)
▲ Page top
Renux Herkanor
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2003 at 11:21 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592759792107
5 posts
I have seen Renux many times in West Karana, loc minus 2989, minus 13399, the NPC she's with is Gindlin Toxfodder and he's a poison ingredient merchant. I don't have the level to kill on my own, but I tried to pickpocket her and threw caution to the wind. After about 15 attempts, she turned to me and the message was that she looked me up and down, but didn't kill me. Very Odd I might add that I'm fullly equipped with Ravenscale. Wish I knew what it's purpose is, there is sure better armour out there, but I have this feeling that it has a purpose.Anyone know?

Edited, Wed Feb 5 11:00:27 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Renux Herkanor
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2003 at 8:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592789781525
Scholar
146 posts
She was indeed at the loc you posted, next to Gindlin. I tried to chant her-- I'm level 60 Bard. She resisted fire and poison every time but frost and disease stuck. She regen'd quite fast because my chants are doing 80/tick with DotB and I did not make a dent.

She initially asked, "When was the last time you had your heart handed to you by a woman?" She summoned me once and hit me for 114 and 199. I chickened out at this point and started running.

Oddly, she never came out of the little shack and she never summoned me again. I just headed west and zoned out.

Sirenetti - 60 Virtuoso, Fennin Ro

Edited, Sat Aug 16 21:03:13 2003
▲ Page top
i likes
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2002 at 2:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781503741
142 posts
i am looking for one with a decent price on the vallon zek server

we all know that the greatest use for this is hunting the most elusive prey/preditors in the game.... thats right other rogues i hate dueling and pking were i cant hide cos they can see me but they can cos i cant see them

so ill gladly appretiate a tell on this sent to pattyricky
a damn tuff kill

#Dumarezq, Posted: Feb 17 2002 at 10:52 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Actually these stats are incorrect, although a level 21 item the bonus is +9 to Intelligence. Dummy. :)
Very nice mask
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2002 at 9:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752767994
Scholar
23 posts
This mask is more than rare cause it only drops from Renux when a rogue is doing this part for his epic.

It has descent AC and Resist but the permanent see invis effect is what makes this mask so interesting. I would never sell mine and the worth of this mask is more like 2k.
▲ Page top
Triggering Renux
QuoteReply
# Oct 26 2001 at 4:12 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591752663727
2 posts
This is how to trigger Renux a solo Rogue can do it all EXCEPT for the killing of Renux. In kaladim near bank pick the pocket of the rogue gm till you get the bottom half of tattered parchment then go to neriak pp Tani rogue gm in neriak 3rd gate rogue guild till you get the top half of tattered parchment. Now go to Highpass and fint Stanos in the smugglers caves if you dont see him say " I need to see Stanos " To Mcbale he will spawn.. Give Stanos top and bottom half of the parchment he will return to you the combined parchment. Take the parchment and 100pp and 2 bottles of unstacked milk to a male Erud in lake Rathe he is in a tower that is on the island dicertly out fron the Rathe mountian zone.. give him teh parchment 2 milks un stacked and 100pp he will give you a scribbled note... here is where it gets fun =). Get a Soul stone from neriak and find a good friend wizzard that is willing to risk his life for you. Port up to hate take a right out of the zone in building go to the wall half way up run along the wall till you get to the gap between the 4th and 5th building first building being the port in) head between the the buildings past teh fountian and the ramp up to Inny, the concert hall will be in front of you go in take a hard right (180 degree) go up the ramp at the back at top of ramp head left and back to teh Meistros bedroom on the nightstand there will be a book grab it. Bring a gate potion w/ you and be sowed and sneak/hiding. Now take teh note and book to Steamfron and hav ea ranger or druid track Yendar Starfyre for you. Give him the note, then give him the note AND book. Renux now spawns and attempts to kill you. Bring friends she hits HARD. Her drops are as follows. Ravenscale mask, Ravenscale belt, Ravenscale cloak, Ravenscale shoulders, Jagged Diamond Dagger 9/23 9dex piercer needed for rogue epic, Trochlicis Skean 10/25 1hs procs Clockwork poison (stun) and teh translated parchment that is also needed for Rogue epic. If you need any help on any of this let me know.

Hudson Dawnweaver
51 Rake of The Amber Order
Bertoxx.
▲ Page top

__DEL__1591751366806

I know Renux in Steamfont randomly drops a few pieces of ravenscale, and I would imagine this would be one. Good luck on 'farming' her since she is for the rogue epic quest and just getting her to spawn, much less killing her, takes a lot of effort.
